data.title: VinFast Reports Record Q4 Deliveries and Ambitious 2025 Target
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

VinFast Auto ( (VFS) ) just unveiled an update.

On February 13, 2025, VinFast Auto Ltd. announced significant growth in its vehicle deliveries, with 53,139 electric vehicles delivered globally in the fourth quarter of 2024, marking a 143% increase compared to the previous quarter and a 342% year-over-year increase. The company set a new delivery record in the final quarter, reaching a total of 97,399 EVs delivered globally for 2024, exceeding their target of 80,000 vehicles. In January 2025, VinFast’s domestic deliveries in Vietnam surpassed 10,000 units, and the company also saw an increase in e-scooter and e-bike deliveries. VinFast aims to double its global deliveries by the end of 2025, reflecting strong market momentum and demand for its products.

More about VinFast Auto

VinFast Auto Ltd., a subsidiary of Vingroup JSC, is Vietnam’s leading automotive manufacturer focused on producing electric SUVs, e-scooters, and e-buses. The company exports its products to markets including the United States and Europe, aiming to contribute to a green future.

YTD Price Performance: -10.71%

Average Trading Volume: 902,639

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $8.77B

data.title: Ganfeng Lithium Begins Production at Mariana Salt-Lake Project
data.description:

Ganfeng Lithium Co ( (HK:1772) ) has shared an update.

Ganfeng Lithium Group Co., Ltd. has announced the commencement of formal production at its Mariana lithium salt-lake project in Argentina, with an annual production capacity of 20,000 tons of lithium chloride. This development is expected to optimize the company’s supply and cost structure, enhance profitability, and strengthen its competitive position in the global lithium market.

More about Ganfeng Lithium Co

Ganfeng Lithium Group Co., Ltd. is a major player in the lithium industry, primarily focusing on the production of lithium and its derivatives. The company operates globally, with a significant market focus on optimizing lithium resources and enhancing its competitive position in the global market.

data.description:

An update from PatientSky Group AS ( (DE:P99) ) is now available.

CodeLab Capital AS held an extraordinary general meeting electronically, where key decisions were made to address board changes and improve the company’s share pricing. The meeting approved the resignation of board member Jesper Melin Ganc-Petersen, electing Anton Lorenz Bondesen as the new chairman. Additionally, a reverse share split was approved to consolidate shares in a 50:1 ratio, aiming to enhance share value and meet Euronext Growth Oslo’s minimum price requirements.

data.title: SFL Corporation Reports Strong Q4 2024 Financial Results and Strategic Fleet Actions
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

SFL Corporation ( (SFL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

SFL Corporation announced its preliminary financial results for Q4 2024 on February 12, 2025, including a net profit of $20.2 million and a cash dividend of $0.27 per share. The company reported a significant fixed rate charter backlog of approximately $4.3 billion and generated $231.7 million in gross charter hire. Additionally, SFL executed strategic fleet management actions, including the issuance of a $150 million bond and the sale of an older container vessel. The company also highlighted its commitment to growth and sustainability through investments in new vessels and fuel efficiency measures.

More about SFL Corporation

SFL Corporation Ltd. is a maritime infrastructure company that has transitioned from vessel financing to owning and operating a diverse fleet. The company’s primary focus is on maintaining a high standard of fleet management, including fuel efficiency and carbon footprint reduction. SFL serves a wide range of investment-grade end users and has continuously expanded its charter backlog with blue chip customers.

Vext Science ( (TSE:VEXT) ) has shared an announcement.

Vext Science has announced the relocation and expansion of its Herbal Wellness Center dispensary in Jackson, Ohio, to a more central location, doubling its retail space and enhancing customer convenience with a drive-thru window. This strategic move aligns with Vext’s plan to capture more market share in Ohio by maximizing its state dispensary cap of eight licenses, thus reinforcing its market position and optimizing its footprint for sustainable growth and shareholder value.

More about Vext Science

Vext Science, Inc. is a U.S.-based cannabis operator with vertical operations in Arizona and Ohio. The company operates in the cannabis industry and offers a wide range of products through its retail dispensaries, cultivation, and manufacturing facilities. Vext focuses on non-urban locations with limited competition and has a strong presence in Ohio, which is a key area for its growth strategy.

The latest announcement is out from Ourgame International Holdings Ltd ( (HK:6899) ).

Ourgame International Holdings Limited has announced a continued suspension of trading in its shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange due to unresolved issues that have led to the suspension. The company faces the risk of having its listing canceled if it does not comply with the resumption guidance and resolve the suspension issues by the deadline of September 27, 2025. The board advises shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution, noting significant uncertainty regarding the resumption of trading.

More about Ourgame International Holdings Ltd

Ourgame International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated under the laws of the Cayman Islands, operating in the gaming and entertainment industry. It primarily focuses on providing online card and board games, and has a significant presence in the Asian market.

data.title: AF Gruppen to Lead Valldalen Dam Upgrade for Hydro Energi
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

AF Gruppen ASA ( (AGRUF) ) just unveiled an update.

Hydro Energi AS has selected AF Gruppen to construct the Valldalen dam and flood diversion project, valued at NOK 200 million. This project aims to upgrade the dam to address climate change and increased flooding, enhancing the infrastructure supporting the Røldal power plant. The construction will involve demolishing the existing spillway and building a new concrete dam, expanding the floodwater side channel, and establishing a new flood tunnel. The work is set to begin in April 2025 and finish by June 2026, reflecting AF Gruppen’s strategic alignment with its expertise in civil engineering projects.

More about AF Gruppen ASA

AF Gruppen ASA is a leading construction and engineering company specializing in civil engineering, building, property, and energy sectors. The company has expertise in tunnels, concrete, and hydropower, allowing it to undertake large-scale infrastructure projects.

data.title: Cellebrite Achieves Strong 2024 Financial Performance with Significant ARR Growth
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest update is out from Cellebrite DI ( (CLBT) ).

Cellebrite reported strong financial results for 2024, achieving a significant 25% growth in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and maintaining a 25% adjusted EBITDA margin, signaling a ‘Rule of 50’ performance. The company experienced a 17% increase in fourth-quarter revenue, driven by a 21% rise in subscription revenue, while also achieving important milestones such as the FedRAMP High Ready designation for its Government Cloud platform. The firm announced leadership changes and strategic advancements, positioning it for sustained growth and profitability in 2025, with expectations of continued top-line expansion and robust free cash flow.

More about Cellebrite DI

Cellebrite DI Ltd. is a global leader in digital investigative solutions serving both the public and private sectors. The company specializes in providing advanced technology solutions to uncover digital evidence for criminal investigations, with a strong market focus on expanding its digital and cloud-based offerings.
